title: Proposition Indexing: A Novel Retrieval Unit for Dense Retrieval

defines.name: Proposition indexing
defines.definition: A dense retrieval approach that indexes a corpus using propositions, which are atomic, self-contained factoid units, instead of passages or sentences.

problem: Dense retrieval systems depend on an overlooked choice of indexing granularity, and passage-level retrieval units can limit retrieval and downstream QA performance under a fixed computation budget.
